name: Green Bean Lucette
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (9 oz.) frozen cut green beans, thawed
1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup
1 can (2.8 oz.) Durkee French fried onions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the thawed green beans, milk, condensed cream of mushroom soup, and black pepper.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
3. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until heated through.
4. Top with the remaining French fried onions.
5. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until golden brown.
